page_title: Wage, overtime and meal break law — Montana
prompt_correction_detail: Prompt hint said ~$10.55/hr; verified value from cache is $10.85/hour (2026 CPI-adjusted). Page uses $10.85.

meta.title: Wage, overtime and meal break law — Montana 2026 | Teamed
meta.description: Montana minimum wage $10.85/hour from 1 Jan 2026. No tip credit. 40-hour OT, no daily trigger. No adult meal-break statute. Wage Protection Act §39-3-201.

key_facts.adjustment_mechanism: Annual CPI (Aug-Aug), announced by 30 Sep, effective 1 Jan; rounds to nearest $0.05
key_facts.small_business_threshold: $110,000 gross annual sales AND not FLSA-covered
key_facts.final_pay_involuntary: Immediately on last day of employment
key_facts.governing_wage_statute: Montana Wage Protection Act, MCA §39-3-201 et seq.

hero.query: Montana Glacier National Park mountains golden hour landscape

flags: PROVISIONAL: min wage $10.85 — re-verify October 2026 when next CPI adjustment announced
PROVISIONAL: FLSA salary threshold $684/week — federal litigation ongoing
PROVISIONAL: minor break thresholds not pulled from cache (not in scope for this page type)
